# Stockfish.js 18 (lite, single-threaded)

Vendored from [nmrugg/stockfish.js](https://github.com/nmrugg/stockfish.js) for in-browser CPU play.

- `stockfish-18-lite-single.js` / `.wasm` — Stockfish 18 lite, single-threaded (no SharedArrayBuffer / COOP-COEP headers required)
- `COPYING.txt` — GNU GPLv3

This engine is licensed under the **GNU General Public License v3**. See `COPYING.txt`. It is included as a separate component for optional CPU opponent mode.
